blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,236 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
